[]: Eva stuff i need help with             Quote Post by Manisha Tank » Wed Aug 16, 2006 11:34 am Dose anybody know where i can get my hands on.... 1. the ps2 games 2.big modles of the evas, bacause ive got all the mini 6inch ones. and i cant seem to find anywhere to buy bigger ones, and i know they excist. 3. and general other anime stuff. cuz all the sites and shops ive been to are really really rubbish. it wud help me a lot. Thanks yall
